textByHash.046e1d5ab922be8ce867c17879eacc75c6769f5a: The medallion! Anne, we've found it!
textByHash.09bb78465062b0c31e99dc6d9ce07d80066f1536: You need to take us to the wreck before we can use the salvaging hook. It should be east of the Karamja Shipyard, so south of here.
textByHash.16bf6b45b58bb919f1a2b46c1963be31aa7006ab: Right, now that we're here, I think it's time to do some salvaging!
textByHash.1e10e3b91233b5e63c9f83d5567436ce752fa813: The wreck should be south east of here.
textByHash.2cd842b873b8524735f4003bdb76f2dd9dbfed9d: Ah, how forgetful of us! Given that you've already accepted, how about we discuss the details on our ship.
textByHash.303fb004ba3b71718b4ebb39656ec81ff37bbb6f: Okay, final question: Do you agree to waive all rights to pursue legal action against your new employer in the event of injury or horrific death?
textByHash.3855695372240b5024ae6cfcbb31740e6ec765ed: Well, it's simple, isn't it? We're in charge!
textByHash.42a12b14ad06421db2bf1feb6b5ae029d0728b58: But first, let's collect some salvage! According to the map, the wreck is just east of the Karamja Shipyard, so south of here.
textByHash.459f5303e5dd38039db94ce33b85037d6ae211b4: Yes! The helm... and the hook!
textByHash.5679dc30146a1a61dee02b39cc897056add64d71: The wind's picked up! You'll need to trim the sails!
textByHash.64eb2a54c004a85ce678b04384f50d02641c4af3: Oh, you'll be back, friend! You already know you can't turn down an opportunity like this!
textByHash.650359c1326f7910223974bc0d15ba530570d604: The wreck should be north of here.
textByHash.6785b3f7544104cc752c9e206d57c3837ead59ce: Remember, you need to take us to the wreck. It should be east of the Karamja Shipyard, so south of here.
textByHash.68d6990d064e492657675477ac549b795949cef2: The wreck should be north west of here.
textByHash.795ebb58fe4d51ba73a5222616737078741cdeac: The wreck should be north east of here.
textByHash.868d660cd8f76146907e7fa36f6cfecdafd03720: Well, don't take too long. This work won't do itself, will it?
textByHash.940fb76a56e543d33c82f039365920005819ab99: You need to trim the sails! We need to catch that wind!
textByHash.98c91f30c5c04cb1bd48c50e917e8bd5be89a98a: Don't go getting grumpy on us now. This isn't about the rewards. It's all about the experience!
textByHash.aef8fe339cfd3932ed92c962456c0a3e27f9a770: The wreck should be south west of here.
textByHash.af26f473e34a8cc84ecd028a9eacabf08d34f0cd: Let's get you started with a nice easy question: What is your name?
textByHash.b72d27ff439f39de011bdf4d3ba40f409f48ba43: Just never on our own ship before! This is an exciting first day for... well, we haven't actually named our business yet, but I'm sure we'll come up with a good name soon.
textByHash.cf1385f6c46fca9b7289532f20d487a3f3fe81d0: Oh dear! It doesn't quite look like you are! You'll need to make some room to carry some things before we head off!
textByHash.d881b49f46d205a1649c9c5c8c7497bfdfa4bac9: Excellent! Well then, , I'm pleased to say that we have the results of your interview. You bring some impressive stuff to the table. We'd love to offer you the role!
textByHash.daa32e6efa8d7a2db72ce1e86d303a491570036e: Goodness, Anne, I think you're right! This one's clearly never worked an honest day in their life, and it's about time someone changed that!
textByHash.deb15cfda5b3fd8a6ca6b64a65e66a6a9535e817: You need to head south of here.
textByHash.ee4e4fe11a9f846134f41a3eeb9aa4e8424483a3: We've got a good one to get us started! Last time we were on the Pandemonium, we purchased a map that should lead us to an old pirate wreck.
textByHash.efcc1de0c92d25a9dc8916397ead5ab5d86bff83: The wreck should be south of here.
textByHash.f47d88eeea281abe132db2e90f65616b5702def5: Next question: Do you have any experience captaining a ship?
textByHash.f5aa3588f2dfd23baf3edacec6de1fa802c1e74d: It means you're in charge of the ship's helm! In other words, you're responsible for steering the ship!
